locs.text: agala lekhan karane se pahale kitane mileesekand tak prateeksha karanee hogee?
setings pravishtiyaan praapt karane mein viphal.
naee skreen mein likhane se pahale kitane mileesekand prateeksha karanee hai?
utpann karane ke lie naamon kee nyoonatam raashi
utpann karane ke lie naamon kee adhikatam raashi
utpann karane ke lie aayu varsh kee nyoonatam raashi
adhikatam aayu varsh utpann karane ke lie
kisee yaadrchchhik vyakti ke lie detaabes lukap ka anukaran karata hai.
